organization: Centre for Law, Technology and Innovation, Bennett University

post.title: Tech Member
post.description: CLTI was a new and unique club launched in 2025 at Bennett University. As a member, I helped organize various fun games and stalls, and played a crucial role in the hackathon LexHack — a one-of-a-kind event that combined building websites with defending them in a simulated courtroom setting.
